landing.heroDesc: Share photos, videos and stories. Connect with amazing people. Discover inspiring content. All in one place.
landing.featuresDesc: Powerful features to share your life with those who matter
landing.photosVideosDesc: Share moments with high-quality photos and videos.
landing.interactiveStoriesDesc: Polls, music, links and captions in your 24h stories.
landing.reactionsLikesDesc: Interact with content using animated likes and comments.
landing.privateMessagesDesc: Real-time chat with media, reactions and audio.
landing.communityDesc: Follow people, discover content and be part of the orbit.
landing.streaksHighlightsDesc: Keep your posting streak and highlight your best stories.
landing.ctaDesc: Join thousands of people who are already sharing their best moments.

feed.beFirst: Be the first to share a photo!

install.title: Install Orbikut
install.installDesc: Get quick access right from your phone's home screen, like a native app.
install.altInstructions: If the button above doesn't work, follow the instructions below:
install.iosStep1: Tap the Share icon in the Safari toolbar
install.iosStep2: Scroll down and tap "Add to Home Screen"
install.androidStep2: Tap "Install app" or "Add to home screen"
install.otherDevice: Open this site on your phone's browser to install the app.
